notes: v1.0.7 — Native QR / barcode / bitmap printing via a new printBytes channel (raster path that works on the MASUNG and other ESC/POS printers that ignore the newer GS(k QR commands). Self-relaunch after OTA install — a MY_PACKAGE_REPLACED broadcast receiver fires the new APK back into MainActivity, so the kiosk is never stranded on the Android home screen after an update. Carries forward v1.0.6: Poppins typography, cancellable OTA (abort stuck downloads), HugeIcons in admin panel and overlay, persistent HOME launcher pin, three admin exit actions (Restart / Quit / Settings).
